since_last: 26% of 100 AI names green; Data Center, Power & Energy leads -0.22%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 26% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.80% · BTC -0.95% · Gold +0.64% · Nasdaq100 -1.52%. 26% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at -0.22%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.22%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.30%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.68%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +4.86%, LEU +2.52%, PANW +2.04%, CSCO +1.87%, VST +1.47%. Laggards: ISRG -12.68%, PUBM -6.31%, UPST -5.44%, META -5.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.29% at $124.17
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
